title: geonoma cuneata subsp. indivisa
intro: Geonoma cuneata subsp. indivisa, commonly known as the solitary palm or indivisa geonoma, is a species of palm tree that belongs to the family Arecaceae. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The leaves of the Geonoma cuneata subsp. indivisa plant can be used to make herbal teas and infusions that are said to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal teas or tinctures.
